_meta.description: Lookup table mapping insurer name → claims fax number + mailing address. Used by credimed-claim-submitter to determine the fax destination and the address rendered on the ADA form.
_meta.format: Insurer key is lowercase, normalized (no punctuation). The Lambda matches via fuzzy lowercased substring on claim.insurer.
_meta.verificationMethod: Each entry has verifiedAt; numbers should be re-confirmed by phone every 12 months. Public sources (carrier websites) prefer; provider-line phone calls definitive.

delta.notes: Each state subsidiary has its own claim fax. Call 800-336-8478 to look up by patient's plan state. TODO: split into delta-ca, delta-ny, delta-tx, etc. once we have first claims.

cigna.notes: Cigna prefers email at WBGDentalClaims@cigna.com but emailing PHI without a BAA is not HIPAA-compliant. Need to call 800-244-6224 to confirm fax line for dental.

bcbs.displayName: Blue Cross Blue Shield (varies by state)
bcbs.notes: Each Blue plan operates independently. TODO: capture patient's specific Blue plan during signup (Anthem BCBS, BCBS of Texas, etc.) and route accordingly.
